name: Greek Pork Pita Pockets
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Shape the mixture into four equal portions and place each portion in a piping bag fitted with a round nozzle.
4. Pipe the mixture onto warm pita bread halves, sealing the edges with a fork.
5. Place the pockets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the internal temperature reaches 160°F (71°C).
7. Turn off the oven and let the pockets rest for 5 minutes before serving.
